abilities.name: Quick Study
abilities.text: This model gains the keywords of the friendly leader.

abilities.name: Tempting Fate
abilities.text: Once per game. When a friendly master is killed, this model may drain two (soulstone). If it does so, deal 4 irreducible damage to this model, then the friendly master heals 4.

abilities.name: Terrifying Presence
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target friendly models within 2" suffer a (-) to their duels.

actions.name: Carrion Crow
actions.effects: This action deals +1 damage for each Remains marker within 2" of the target. Then, remove a Remains marker within 2" of the target.

triggers.name: Heave
triggers.text: Place the target anywhere within 3" of this model.

actions.name: Fly With Me
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may target a friendly model within 2".
actions.effects: Place this model within range. If this action received a raise, place the target (if any) in base contact with this model.

triggers.name: Puncturing Talons
triggers.text: When resolving, this action receives one additional raise.
